identity: Human male warlock, sharp angular face, swept-back ink-black hair, glowing violet eyes with faint red undertone, pale skin with a faint dark tattoo under one eye, tall slender build.
outfit: Deep purple-and-black high-collar robes lined with crimson fel-fire runes, dark pauldrons with small curled horns on each shoulder. Black leather belt with a chained tome attached. Black boots.
weapons: A heavy leather-bound grimoire floating open beside his right shoulder, pages glowing with violet runes. Free right hand crackling with violet fel-fire.
attackStyle: East-facing. Right hand thrust forward, a bolt of violet-and-crimson fel-fire erupting outward. Tome floats behind shoulder.
spellStyle: East-facing. Both hands raised, tome hovering above, a swirling purple pentagram forming between the palms.
blockStyle: East-facing. Tome floats in front, pages open, a translucent violet rune-barrier spreading from the pages.
koStyle: East-facing, slumped forward, tome fallen beside him, pages splayed. Violet eye-glow dimmed.
southStyle: Facing camera (south), sinister idle. Tome floating at his side, right hand open with a small violet flame in the palm.
portraitStyle: Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Sharp face, swept-back black hair, glowing violet eyes, horned pauldrons visible.

referenceSheet.prompt:
IDENTITY (this image becomes the canonical identity anchor — preserve in every downstream frame): Human male warlock, sharp angular face, swept-back ink-black hair, glowing violet eyes with faint red undertone, pale skin with a faint dark tattoo under one eye, tall slender build.

OUTFIT: Deep purple-and-black high-collar robes lined with crimson fel-fire runes, dark pauldrons with small curled horns on each shoulder. Black leather belt with a chained tome attached. Black boots.

WEAPONS: A heavy leather-bound grimoire floating open beside his right shoulder, pages glowing with violet runes. Free right hand crackling with violet fel-fire.

CLASS: humanoid. Full-body view, head to feet visible. Character occupies ~70% of the canvas height. Feet aligned near the bottom; headroom above.

POSE: full-body side profile facing right (east), calm combat-ready idle. Head up, eyes visible. NOT a portrait bust, NOT a close-up — entire character from head to feet.

STYLE: detailed pixel art with clean readable silhouette, warm pixel-art palette, transparent background, no ground shadow.

portrait.prompt:
IDENTITY (must match reference sheet exactly): Human male warlock, sharp angular face, swept-back ink-black hair, glowing violet eyes with faint red undertone, pale skin with a faint dark tattoo under one eye, tall slender build.

OUTFIT: Deep purple-and-black high-collar robes lined with crimson fel-fire runes, dark pauldrons with small curled horns on each shoulder. Black leather belt with a chained tome attached. Black boots.

WEAPONS: A heavy leather-bound grimoire floating open beside his right shoulder, pages glowing with violet runes. Free right hand crackling with violet fel-fire.

POSE (portrait): Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Sharp face, swept-back black hair, glowing violet eyes, horned pauldrons visible.

FRAMING: bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view, centered in a 256x256 canvas, shoulders fill the lower third.

SCALE (non-negotiable): character must occupy approximately 180px of the 256px canvas height — roughly 70%. Do NOT stretch or upscale. Extra space above head and/or below feet is correct.

STYLE: pixel art, transparent background, no ground shadow, no borders, no text. Match the palette and style of the reference sheet.

NEGATIVE: do not add weapons or props not listed in WEAPONS. Do not change palette, species, or outfit from the reference sheet. Do not zoom in — respect SCALE.
